author: jih2nn
content: Let me break down my question; The CL will call FcU with ILs at 8s (or 9s) into the slot. Then the EL has 3s-4s to build a payload. Is this going to be enough time to prepare a payload? It seems all EL clients but Erigon rebuild payloads from scratch during each iteration. I'd love to know if this 3s-4s window is enough for the EL to produce a payload with IL transactions.

author: jih2nn
content: Regarding new `payloadId`, I think it's up to the EL client? I might be wrong, but you could omit ILs from the payload identifier calculation as it can change over time, if it makes sense.
